name: Solarized
description: Ethan Schoonover's precision-engineered color scheme for comfortable reading.

preview.sampleText: Precision colors designed for optimal readability and reduced eye strain.

classes.tr: border border-yellow-200 dark:border-gray-600 even:bg-yellow-50 odd:bg-yellow-100 dark:even:bg-gray-700 dark:odd:bg-gray-800
classes.th: border border-yellow-200 dark:border-gray-600 p-2 bg-yellow-200 dark:bg-gray-700 font-semibold text-yellow-900 dark:text-yellow-300
classes.blockquote: border-l-4 border-blue-400 dark:border-blue-500 pl-4 italic my-4 text-yellow-700 dark:text-slate-400 bg-yellow-50 dark:bg-gray-800 py-2 rounded-r
classes.code: bg-yellow-100 dark:bg-gray-700 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-mono text-sm text-red-600 dark:text-orange-400
classes.pre: bg-yellow-100 dark:bg-gray-800 p-4 rounded overflow-x-auto border border-yellow-200 dark:border-gray-600
